componentDescription: A flexible container component for arranging and resizing child panels dynamically.

children.description: Defines the content to be rendered inside the Resizable component.

orientation.description: Specifies the orientation of the resizable panels (horizontal or vertical).

size.description: Sets a predefined size configuration for the resizable panels.

variant.description: Determines the visual style or behavior variant of the resizable component.

defaultSizes.description: Provides initial sizes for the panels when the component first renders.

onSizesChange.description: Callback function invoked when the sizes of the panels change.

minSize.description: Sets the minimum overall size allowed for the resizable container.

maxSize.description: Sets the maximum overall size allowed for the resizable container.

collapsible.description: Enables or disables the ability for panels to be collapsed.

autoSaveId.description: An ID used to automatically save and restore panel sizes.

storage.description: Specifies the storage mechanism for saving and restoring panel states.

keyboardResizeBy.description: Defines the step size for resizing panels using keyboard input.

views.description: Allows custom styling for different parts of the Resizable component.
